1359.reason: [The handleError method incorrectly assumes that when the expected token is present, it should consume it with move(), but the calling code has already created a fake token node and expects the real token to be consumed. This creates a double-consumption issue when the token is present, and fails to properly handle recovery when the token is missing. Additionally, the method doesn't actually consume the expected token when an error occurs, leaving the parser in an inconsistent state.]
